sc.political.s: FEC records show New Belgium Brewing donations: 2020 cycle 88% Democratic recipients ($79K of $90K).
sc.dei.s: Published DEI strategic plan 2021; disclosed board composition targets and employee resource groups.
sc.environment.s: B Corp certified 2010; Science Based Targets initiative participant; Scope 1+2 emissions disclosed annually.
sc.charity.s: Named ~$1M+ annual donations via New Belgium Foundation; disclosed community grant programs.
sc.animals.s: No animal testing or certification claim applicable to brewery operations.
sc.guns.s: No firearms manufacturing or retail; brewery and merchandise operations only.
sc.privacy.s: No documented data breaches or FTC privacy actions identified.
sc.execPay.s: No public CEO-to-median-worker ratio data available.

charity.focus: Climate action, water stewardship, social equity, LGBTQ+ rights, environmental education
